task_completion.description: Open the Experiment Settings dialog in PsychoPy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy application window is open, and the 'Experiment Settings' dialog box is visible on the screen.
In the 'Basic' tab of the Experiment Settings dialog, the 'Experiment name' text field contains exactly 'AttentionStudy'.

task_completion.description: Disable full-screen mode for the experiment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Screen' tab of the Experiment Settings dialog, the checkbox next to 'Full-screen window' is unchecked/empty.

task_completion.description: Set the window size to 1024 x 768 pixels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Screen' tab of the Experiment Settings dialog, the 'Window size (pixels)' field contains '[1024, 768]' or '1024, 768'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the data filename includes the participant ID.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Data' tab of the Experiment Settings dialog, the 'Data filename' field contains a reference to the participant, such as 'expInfo['participant']' or the word 'participant'.

task_completion.description: Save the experiment to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the directory '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments' and the filename 'attention_study.psyexp', OR the main PsychoPy window title bar displays 'attention_study.psyexp' indicating it has been saved.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the PsychoPy graphical user interface to configure settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual PsychoPy Builder interface and Experiment Settings dialogs being clicked and typed into, rather than a text editor modifying a .psyexp XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass GUI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing commands like 'echo' or python scripts being used to generate the attention_study.psyexp file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a live, responsive application.
integrity.visual_evidence: UI elements like tabs (Basic, Data, Screen) appear active and selected in different screenshots, showing genuine navigation through the application's menus.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is exactly: /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/attention_study.psyexp. Verify this path appears in the save dialog or the application title bar.
